subparts.text: Identify the process and approaches to performance appraisal. CO 1
What are the pre-requisites of performance management? What are the key reasons behind the move from performance appraisal to performance management? CO 1
“Performance counselling is the heart of performance management system.” Do you agree? CO 2
What are the key questions which should be considered while designing a performance linked reward system? CO 2
What is competency-based performance management, and how does it differ from traditional methods? CO 1
Why did SeaCloud decide to revamp its performance management system? What measures were introduced under SeaCloud’s new system? CO 1
Write a short note on economic theory of choice and employee benefits. CO 1

What are the critical dimensions of Employee Value Proposition, and how has Tesco Business Services addressed this? Why did TBS introduce a wide range of employee benefits and a hyper- personalized employee experience? CO 2
How will today’s mega-trends, particularly demographic and technological transformation, reshape the future design and importance of employee benefits plans? CO 2
What are the main difference in employee benefits between United States, South Korea and India. CO 2
